name: First State Bank
description_short: Anadarko's First State Bank at 102 W Main St delivers banking services to Woodward County residents in OK.
description_long:
First State Bank's Anadarko branch sits at 102 W Main St in the heart of downtown Anadarko, OK. This standalone banking facility serves local residents and businesses with traditional in-person banking services. Hours and current services may vary, so contacting the branch directly is recommended for the most up-to-date information.

At this Anadarko location, customers can access personal banking services, business accounts, and lending products tailored to Anadarko's community needs. For details on specific services available at the 102 W Main St branch, contact First State Bank's customer service to speak with someone familiar with this Anadarko office.

Residents of Anadarko can access banking services at the downtown location on 102 W Main St, conveniently situated in the heart of Anadarko, OK. Bring valid identification and any required documentation when opening new accounts or handling banking transactions. First State Bank has been meeting the financial needs of Anadarko residents.
services: Consumer loans for vehicles, appliances, and major purchases
Debit cards including Rewards Plus Debit Card with contactless payment
Mobile banking app for balance checks, transactions, transfers, and bill payments
Bill Pay service with one-time and recurring payment scheduling
E-statements for online account statement access and storage
Lost or stolen debit card reporting (24/7 hotline)
pros: Locally-owned and operated since 1909 with deep community ties and decision-making authority in Anadarko
FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Mobile banking app allows account access, balance checks, transfers, and loan payments from anywhere
Bill Pay service enables one-time and recurring payment scheduling for convenience
24/7 debit card hotline for lost or stolen card support
Rewards Plus Debit Card program provides rewards on purchases
Strong agricultural lending focus and support for local farming and ranching operations
E-statements available for paperless, secure online statement storage
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Anadarko and Gracemont, Oklahoma only
Minimal transparency on website regarding specific loan rates, fees, or APR information
Small asset base ($100 million) and limited staff (25 employees) may restrict product sophistication compared to larger banks
Website lacks detailed information on specific account types, minimum balances, or product features
No information provided about customer service hours, response times, or support capabilities
best_for: Anadarko and Gracemont area residents seeking personalized, community-focused banking
Local farmers and ranchers needing agricultural lending and business banking relationships
Customers who prioritize working with a locally-owned institution over national bank chains
Individuals seeking FDIC-insured accounts with convenient mobile and online banking access
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for Anadarko and Gracemont residents who value community banking and personalized relationships over chain bank convenience. The main caveat is its strictly local service area and limited public information about specific products, rates, and fees—potential customers should contact the bank directly for detailed product information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 102 W Main St, Anadarko, OK. Full-service banking for Anadarko residents.
